headline: Pentagon Moves to Secure Rare Earth Metals for Next-Gen Weapons
summary: The Pentagon has taken a step toward rebuilding one of the most fragile links in the U.S. defense supply chain: the industrial capability to turn rare earth minerals into the metals that power most modern weapons systems. Companies mentioned in this release include: REalloys Inc. (ALOY), Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT), RTX Corporation (NYSE: RTX), Boeing (NYSE: BA), Northrop Grumman (NYSE: NOC), General Dynamics (NYSE: GD).
